commands.review_summary:
Adds an opt-in gateway exec shell snapshot cache for bash/zsh startup aliases, functions, and safe environment setup, consolidates shell utilities, updates docs/tests, and removes the duplicate shell utility path.

PR surface: Source +395, Tests +583, Docs +13. Total +991 across 13 files.

Reproducibility: yes. the issue is source-reproducible from the PR diff: gateway approvals register `params.command`, then the new runtime wrapper sources a snapshot and `eval`s the command. I did not run a full approval E2E flow in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Manual maintainer/security review is needed because the remaining blocker is the product/security contract for opt-in shell startup trust, not a single mechanical repair choice.

target.title: feat: add exec shell snapshot cache
target.body:
## Summary

- Consolidates shell helpers into `src/agents/shell-utils.ts` and deletes the duplicate `src/agents/utils/shell.ts` path.
- Adds an opt-in exec shell snapshot manager behind Gateway process env `OPENCLAW_EXEC_SHELL_SNAPSHOT=1` for bash/zsh host exec runs.
- Caches sourced aliases/functions/safe env under the OpenClaw state cache, excludes secret-like state, uses private capture files, bounds refresh, and documents the env surface.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/shell-utils.test.ts src/agents/shell-snapshot.test.ts src/agents/bash-tools.exec-runtime.test.ts src/agents/sessions/tools/bash.test.ts src/docs/environment-docs.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:core --pretty false`
- `pnpm format:check src/agents/shell-utils.ts src/agents/shell-utils.test.ts src/agents/shell-snapshot.ts src/agents/shell-snapshot.test.ts src/agents/bash-tools.exec-runtime.ts src/agents/sessions/bash-executor.ts src/agents/sessions/resolve-config-value.ts src/agents/sessions/tools/bash.ts src/agents/sessions/tools/render-utils.ts docs/tools/exec.md docs/help/environment.md`
- `git diff --check`
- Local exec runtime smoke with `OPENCLAW_EXEC_SHELL_SNAPSHOT=1`, temp HOME/state, bash alias, bash function, and PATH-only command: `{"status":"completed","aggregated":"fn-e2e alias-e2e path-e2e"}`
- `/Users/steipete/Projects/agent-scripts/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`: clean, no accepted/actionable findings.

## Real Behavior Proof

Behavior addressed: host exec can opt into cached bash/zsh startup snapshots so aliases, functions, and safe PATH-like environment setup from shell startup files are available without sourcing startup files on every command.

Real environment tested: local macOS checkout using `runExecProcess` host execution with a temp bash HOME, temp OpenClaw state directory, and Gateway-level `OPENCLAW_EXEC_SHELL_SNAPSHOT=1`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: the local smoke created a `.bashrc` containing an alias, function, and PATH export, then ran the exec command `oc_snapshot_fn_e2e; printf " "; oc_snapshot_alias_e2e; printf " "; oc-snapshot-path-e2e` through `runExecProcess`.

Evidence after fix: the smoke completed with `fn-e2e alias-e2e path-e2e`, proving the command used the snapshot for the function, alias, and PATH command lookup.

Observed result after fix: focused tests, typecheck, formatting, diff whitespace, local smoke, and autoreview all pass.

What was not tested: live Windows Git Bash host execution; sandbox/container exec snapshotting is disabled by design. Broad docs/lint checks were not rerun because existing unrelated failures were observed in `docs/tools/slash-commands.md` and `extensions/discord/src/monitor/gateway-plugin.ts` during earlier proof attempts.
target.author: steipete
